ddls:
CREATE TABLE "carbon_emissions" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data record */,
  "d_area" INTEGER /* Total area of the region under study */,
  "d_area_acc" INTEGER /* Accumulated area over the years */,
  "vr_co2_1st_order" INTEGER /* First-order estimate of carbon dioxide emissions from vegetation */,
  "vr_co2_2nd_order" INTEGER /* Second-order estimate of carbon dioxide emissions from vegetation */,
  "vr_co2_2nd_order_fire" INTEGER /* Second-order estimate of carbon dioxide emissions from vegetation due to fire */,
  "vr_co2_2nd_order_decay" INTEGER /* Second-order estimate of carbon dioxide emissions from vegetation due to decay */,
  "vr_ch4_eq_2nd_order_fire" INTEGER /* Second-order estimate of methane equivalent emissions from vegetation due to fire */,
  "vr_n2o_eq_2nd_order_fire" INTEGER /* Second-order estimate of nitrous oxide equivalent emissions from vegetation due to fire */,
  "sv_area_total" INTEGER /* Total vegetation cover */,
  "sv_area_cleared" INTEGER /* Vegetation cover cleared */,
  "sv_co2_emission" INTEGER /* Carbon dioxide emissions from vegetation */,
  "sv_co2_absorption" INTEGER /* Carbon dioxide absorption by vegetation */,
  "net_co2_2nd_order" INTEGER /* Net second-order carbon dioxide emissions */,
  "net_co2_1st_order" INTEGER /* Net first-order carbon dioxide emissions */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the data record */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground-based sensors) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "vegetation_cover" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data record */,
  "sv_area_total" INTEGER /* Total vegetation cover */,
  "sv_area_cleared" INTEGER /* Vegetation cover cleared */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the data record */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground-based sensors) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "carbon_emission_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the factor (e.g., kg CO2/ha) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission estimate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data record */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the factor */,
  "co2_emission" INTEGER /* Carbon dioxide emissions */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the estimate */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the estimate (e.g., satellite, ground-based sensors) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the estimate (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_estimates_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES carbon_emission_factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_estimates_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES carbon_emissions ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Data version accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_version FOREIGN KEY ("data_version") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES carbon_emissions ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data for the version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., satellite, ground-based sensors) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
